source.title: Video Ad for AI / SaaS Product | Doks.AI

style.typography: bold geometric sans for reveals; compact neutral sans for UI
style.audio_language: original techno/electronic music with synchronized UI and transition accents; no voice

shots.visual: Small brand identifier and large product category over dark navy with luminous green arcs; the first product surface rises from below.
shots.motion: fast type reveal, slow background drift, vertical UI entrance
shots.hive_transfer: Reveal HIVE plus a one-line category statement while a real CLI pane rises into frame.

shots.visual: A search control anchors a stack of assistant cards with shallow perspective, lime highlights, and floating accent shapes.
shots.copy_function: show several product surfaces without explanation
shots.motion: cards enter in staggered layers; subtle parallax and glow pulses
shots.transition_out: camera locks onto the primary action
shots.hive_transfer: Stack distinct HIVE agent cards around one command surface, using original honeycomb accents.

shots.visual: The frame pushes tightly into the main AI action pill while parallel light tracks reinforce direction.
shots.motion: rapid zoom, button pulse, horizontal trail sweep
shots.transition_out: button glow becomes a full panel
shots.hive_transfer: Push into a HIVE CLI invocation or delegate action, keeping the typed command fully legible.

shots.visual: A bright rounded rectangle expands on a quiet grid field and resolves into the next interface state.
shots.hive_transfer: Morph the command confirmation into an agent-work pane using HIVE geometry.

shots.visual: A concise developer request appears, followed by a structured generated response inside a minimal chat layout.
shots.motion: question settles, response indicator advances, answer rows reveal
shots.transition_out: hard cut on the completed answer
shots.hive_transfer: Show request, delegation, verification, and result; never fake output that HIVE cannot produce.

shots.visual: Angled interface panels compare two chatbot presentation modes with floating labels.
shots.motion: card rotation, lateral camera drift, staggered label change
shots.transition_out: clean cut to a centered ecosystem layout
shots.hive_transfer: Compare two agent arrangements or CLI output modes with original HIVE UI.

shots.visual: A source-integration grid appears centered, grows toward camera, then tilts to reveal additional supported systems.
shots.motion: grid build, dolly-in, perspective tilt, icon emphasis
shots.transition_out: icons collapse into a small brand glyph
shots.hive_transfer: Use only verified HIVE adapters or generic repository/tool symbols; do not copy the source icon arrangement.

shots.visual: A luminous green glass-like object contracts against an almost empty navy field.
shots.copy_function: reset visual density before the promise
shots.transition_out: glyph becomes an inline typographic element
shots.hive_transfer: Substitute an original honeycomb cell or network node; avoid the reference glyph's silhouette and material treatment.

shots.visual: A centered closing proposition assembles in short phrase groups around the moving glyph, then resolves with the product name.
shots.copy_function: turn product proof into a memorable promise
shots.motion: phrase-by-phrase reveal, glyph travel, restrained scale changes
shots.hive_transfer: Build a new HIVE promise from short original phrases; keep the screen sparse and the honeycomb node in motion.

shots.visual: Centered logo and short action prompt over the returning luminous arcs.
shots.motion: quick logo settle followed by a nearly static hold
shots.audio: music decays below -40 dB at 18.758 seconds; final 1.356 seconds are effectively silent
shots.hive_transfer: End on the HIVE mark, install or documentation command, and a stable two-second readability hold.

clean_room_constraints: Do not ship or redistribute the downloaded reference video or its audio.
Keep the timestamped contact sheet internal to analysis and out of campaign exports.
Do not reproduce the Doks.ai logo, copy, interface artwork, integration grid, brand glyph, or exact transition choreography.
Use HIVE-owned screenshots, verified product claims, original illustrations, original music, and original sound effects.
Treat durations and narrative roles as pacing references, not frame-for-frame instructions.
